content.text:
## Complete Content: Cells Index View **File:** `S:\01_Repos\BeFirst_Portal\firstronic\Areas\Manage\Views\Cells\Index.cshtml` ```cshtml @using Firstronic.Core.Entities.App.First; @using NonFactors.Mvc.Grid; @model IQueryable

Manage Cell

@(Html .Grid(Model) .Build(columns => { columns.Add(model => model.CellName).RenderedAs(model => Html.ActionLink(model.CellName.ToString(), "Edit", "Cells", new { id = model.CellID }, new { })); columns.Add(model => model.CellType_Name); columns.Add(model => model.Facility_Name); columns.Add(model => "Edit").RenderedAs(model => Html.ActionLink("Edit", "Edit", new { id = model.CellID }, new { @class = "editbutton" })).Css("editlink"); }) .Empty("No data found") .Pageable(pager => { pager.PagesToDisplay = 10; pager.RowsPerPage = 15; }) .Filterable() .Sortable() )
@Resources.Actions.Add
``` --- ## Pattern Summary: md-card for Index/List Views **Structure:** ```html

[Page Title]

@(Html.Grid(Model) .Build(columns => { ... }) .Empty("No data found") .Pageable(pager => { ... }) .Filterable() .Sortable() )
@Resources.Actions.Add
``` **Key Elements:** 1. **md-card wrapper** - Material design card container 2. **md-card-toolbar** - Header section with page title 3. **md-card-content** - Main content area 4. **NonFactors.Mvc.Grid** - Data grid component with filtering/sorting/paging 5. **Action button** - Bottom margin (`mn-t-20`) with primary button for "Add" action **Grid Features:** - Filterable columns - Sortable columns - Pagination (10 pages displayed, 15 rows per page) - Edit links in rows - Empty state message ("No data found") This is the standard pattern used throughout BeFirst Portal for Index/list views in all areas.
